calendar.matters:
Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee To Fill Vacancy
Off Calendar Feb-06-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Brianna K. Mannion for the SF Public Administrator, Petitioner (via Zoom).

The court inquired about efforts to locate Kathleen Calhoun, a potential interested party. Ms. Mannion explained that the estate investigator conducted a search but could not locate an address. A cousin, Arnold, confirmed that Kathleen was aware of the decedent's passing and expressed no interest in the matter. Given the small estate value ($52,000) and the charitable intent of the trust, Ms. Manion determined further efforts were unnecessary.

The court approved dispensing with notice to Kathleen Calhoun under the circumstances. The matter was taken under submission with the intent to grant the petition.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
